subcodes.first_line: O thou long-standing servant of the Abha Beauty! Thy letter was perused, and that which thou hast offered in complaint and remonstrance is justly acknowledged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دیرین جمال ابهی نامه ات تلاوت گشت و آنچه گله فرماای و شکوه نماای محقی
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @love of God
